theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : n = 0 → ∃ p, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  intro h
  have : n = 0 := h
  have : n < n + 1 := by omega
  exact Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)

theorem even_or_odd (n : Nat) : EvenOrOdd n where
  | even => by
    intro "n is even"
    | odd  => by
    intro "n is odd"
    exact Nat.even_or_odd n
  end

after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : Nat) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  have h := Nat.even_or_odd n
  cases h with
  | inl h_even => exact Or.inl h_even
  | inr h_odd => exact Or.inr h_odd

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  have h := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  obtain ⟨p, hp_ge, hp_prime⟩ := h
  refine' ⟨p, _, hp_prime⟩
  linarith
